# FiberTools — Complete Site Documentation

> https://fibertools.app

FiberTools is a suite of 31 free, browser-based calculators and references for fiber arts — knitting, crochet, weaving, spinning, embroidery, and cross stitch. Created by a fiber arts expert with 30+ years of experience. All processing happens client-side — no data is sent to any server. No login required. Works offline as a Progressive Web App. Every tool includes educational content, expert tips, and FAQ sections.

US crochet terminology is used throughout. Yarn weights follow the Craft Yarn Council (CYC) standard: Lace (0), Fingering (1), Sport (2), DK (3), Worsted (4), Bulky (5), Super Bulky (6), Jumbo (7).

---

## Tools — Knitting & Crochet (25 tools)

### Yarn Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/yarn-calculator
- Calculate exactly how much yarn you need for any project — blankets, sweaters, scarves, hats, socks, and more. Enter your gauge, dimensions, and yarn weight to get precise yardage and skein estimates. Supports all CYC yarn weights from Lace (0) to Jumbo (7).

### Needle & Hook Size Converter
- URL: https://fibertools.app/needle-converter
- Convert knitting needle and crochet hook sizes between US, UK, metric (mm), and Japanese sizing systems. Includes steel crochet hooks and Tunisian hooks. Bidirectional lookup.

### Gauge Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/gauge-calculator
- Calculate your gauge from a swatch measurement, resize patterns to a new gauge, and get exact stitch and row counts for target dimensions. Essential for ensuring garments fit correctly.

### Yarn Weight Chart
- URL: https://fibertools.app/yarn-weight-chart
- Interactive yarn weight reference chart covering all CYC categories (Lace 0 through Jumbo 7) with US, UK, and Australian names, recommended needle/hook sizes, typical gauge ranges, and substitution compatibility checker.

### Stitch Counter
- URL: https://fibertools.app/stitch-counter
- Free online stitch and row counter with multiple named counters, row reminder alerts, pattern repeat tracking, and offline support. Works on mobile mid-project.

### Blanket Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/blanket-calculator
- Find the right stitch count, row count, and yarn yardage for any blanket size from baby (30x40 in) to king (108x90 in). Enter your gauge and get complete project specifications.

### Increase & Decrease Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/increase-decrease-calculator
- Get stitch-by-stitch row instructions for distributing increases or decreases evenly across a row or round. Handles any starting and target stitch count with mathematically even distribution.

### Stripe Generator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/stripe-generator
- Generate random, weighted, or structured stripe patterns with up to 8 colors. Calculates per-color yardage estimates based on your gauge and width.

### Abbreviation Glossary
- URL: https://fibertools.app/abbreviation-glossary
- Searchable glossary of 200+ knitting and crochet abbreviations with US/UK terminology toggle. Includes definitions, usage notes, and common variations.

### Stitch Pattern Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/stitch-pattern-calculator
- Find compatible stitch counts for sampler blankets with 50+ stitch patterns. Enter your target width and gauge to get stitch counts that work with multiple pattern repeats.

### Stitch Quick Reference
- URL: https://fibertools.app/stitch-quick-reference
- Visual step-by-step instructions for every basic crochet and knitting stitch including chain, slip stitch, single crochet, double crochet, knit, purl, and more.

### UK to US Converter
- URL: https://fibertools.app/uk-to-us-converter
- Convert UK crochet pattern terminology to US equivalents and vice versa. Handles the one-step offset (UK dc = US sc, UK tr = US dc, etc.) with full pattern text conversion.

### Perfect Circle Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/circle-calculator
- Generate flat circle crochet patterns with staggered increases to prevent hexagonal distortion. Supports any starting stitch count and generates round-by-round instructions.

### Sewing & Craft Needle Guide
- URL: https://fibertools.app/needle-guide
- Visual guide to needle types for sewing, embroidery, tapestry, quilting, and other crafts. Includes size ranges, point types, and project recommendations.

### Amigurumi Shapes Guide
- URL: https://fibertools.app/amigurumi-shapes
- Round-by-round increase/decrease instructions for sphere, cone, cylinder, oval, and flat circle shapes. Adjustable for any target diameter with magic ring starts.

### Project Cost Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/project-cost-calculator
- Calculate the total cost of a fiber arts project including yarn, notions, patterns, and time estimate. Helps price handmade items for commissions or craft fairs.

### Color Pooling Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/color-pooling-calculator
- Calculate the exact stitch count to make variegated or self-striping yarn pool into argyle and plaid patterns. Enter your yarn's color repeat length and gauge.

### WPI to Yarn Weight Converter
- URL: https://fibertools.app/wpi-calculator
- Enter wraps per inch (WPI) to identify yarn weight category, recommended needle/hook sizes, typical gauge range, and suitable project ideas. Essential for unlabeled or handspun yarn.

### Cast On Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/cast-on-calculator
- Calculate how many stitches to cast on for any target width, accounting for stitch pattern multiples and edge stitches. Rounds to the nearest valid multiple.

### Hat Size Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/hat-calculator
- Get cast-on count, crown decrease schedule, and total yardage for any head size from preemie to large adult. Supports both knit and crochet with multiple crown shaping methods.

### Sock Knitting Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/sock-calculator
- Calculate sock stitch counts for top-down or toe-up construction with heel flap, gusset, and short-row heel options. Supports any foot circumference and shoe size.

### Sleeve Shaping Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/sleeve-calculator
- Get row-by-row increase or decrease instructions for tapered sleeves in knit or crochet. Enter upper arm, wrist, and length measurements for precise shaping.

### Raglan Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/raglan-calculator
- Calculate neck cast-on stitches, stitch distribution across front/back/sleeves, and increase rounds for a top-down raglan sweater. Supports any gauge and neck circumference.

### Blocking Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/blocking-calculator
- Get the right blocking method (wet, steam, spray, pin) for your fiber type with stretch feasibility ratings and step-by-step instructions. Covers wool, cotton, acrylic, silk, and blends.

### Yarn Stash Estimator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/stash-estimator
- Estimate remaining yardage in partial skeins by weighing them. Includes a yardage reference table for identifying unlabeled yarn by weight category.

## Tools — Crochet-Specific (2 tools)

### C2C Blanket Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/c2c-calculator
- Plan a corner-to-corner (C2C) crochet blanket with block counts per diagonal row, total block count, and yardage estimates. Supports rectangular and square layouts.

### Granny Square Planner
- URL: https://fibertools.app/granny-square-planner
- Plan a granny square blanket with grid layout dimensions, total square count, per-color yardage estimates, and joining yarn calculations. Supports multi-color schemes.

## Tools — Spinning (1 tool)

### Spinning Ratio Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/spinning-ratio-calculator
- Calculate drive ratios, twists per inch (TPI), and plying ratios for handspinning. Supports scotch tension, double drive, and bobbin-lead systems.

## Tools — Weaving (1 tool)

### Weaving Sett Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/weaving-sett-calculator
- Find the right sett (ends per inch / EPI) for your yarn weight and weave structure (plain, twill, satin). Includes warp length calculations with loom waste and take-up, plus reed substitution.

## Tools — Cross Stitch (1 tool)

### Cross Stitch Calculator
- URL: https://fibertools.app/cross-stitch-calculator
- Calculate finished dimensions for any stitch count and fabric count (Aida, evenweave, linen). Estimates thread amounts per color with skein counts.

## Tools — Embroidery (1 tool)

### Thread Converter
- URL: https://fibertools.app/thread-converter
- Convert between DMC, Anchor, Cosmo, and Sulky embroidery thread numbers. Searchable database with color name lookup and closest-match suggestions.

---

## Blog Posts

- [How Much Yarn Do I Need?](https://fibertools.app/blog/yarn-calculator-guide): The complete guide to calculating yarn for any project — blankets, sweaters, scarves, and more.
- [Knitting Needle & Crochet Hook Size Chart](https://fibertools.app/blog/needle-size-chart-guide): US, Metric, UK & Japanese size conversion chart for needles and hooks.
- [How to Calculate and Adjust Gauge](https://fibertools.app/blog/gauge-calculator-guide): Why gauge matters, how to measure it, and how to resize patterns.
- [Yarn Weight Chart](https://fibertools.app/blog/yarn-weight-chart-guide): From lace to jumbo with needle sizes and gauge ranges.
- [How to Count Stitches and Rows](https://fibertools.app/blog/stitch-counter-guide): Tips for accurate stitch and row tracking in knitting and crochet.
- [Blanket Size Guide](https://fibertools.app/blog/blanket-size-guide): Standard dimensions for baby, throw, and bed blankets.
- [How to Increase and Decrease Evenly](https://fibertools.app/blog/increase-decrease-guide): The math made easy for distributing increases or decreases across a row.
- [How to Plan Stripe Patterns](https://fibertools.app/blog/stripe-pattern-guide): Random, weighted, and sequence stripes with yardage planning.
- [Knitting and Crochet Abbreviations](https://fibertools.app/blog/knitting-abbreviations-guide): The complete reference guide to abbreviations.
- [Spinning Wheel Ratios Explained](https://fibertools.app/blog/spinning-wheel-guide): How to calculate drive ratio and TPI for handspinning.
- [Cross Stitch Fabric Calculator](https://fibertools.app/blog/cross-stitch-fabric-guide): How to figure out the right size Aida cloth.
- [How to Calculate Sett for Weaving](https://fibertools.app/blog/weaving-sett-guide): EPI guide for every yarn weight.
- [How Much Does It Cost to Crochet a Blanket?](https://fibertools.app/blog/project-cost-guide): The honest price breakdown for handmade projects.
- [Color Pooling Calculator Guide](https://fibertools.app/blog/color-pooling-guide): How to plan pooling with variegated yarn.
- [DMC to Anchor Thread Conversion](https://fibertools.app/blog/thread-conversion-guide): The complete searchable embroidery thread conversion chart.
- [Stitch Multiples for Sampler Blankets](https://fibertools.app/blog/stitch-multiples-sampler-blanket-guide): How to calculate compatible stitch counts for sampler blankets.
- [Crochet Stitch Quick Reference](https://fibertools.app/blog/crochet-stitch-quick-reference-guide): Yarn overs, pull-throughs, and turning chains explained.

## Guides

- [How to Read a Yarn Label](https://fibertools.app/guides/reading-yarn-labels): Complete guide to yarn weight symbols, care instructions, dye lots, and gauge information on yarn labels.
- [Knitting Gauge: Why It Matters](https://fibertools.app/guides/knitting-gauge-guide): How to make a gauge swatch, block it, measure it, and resize patterns when your gauge doesn't match.
- [How Much Yarn for a Blanket?](https://fibertools.app/guides/blanket-yarn-guide): Yardage estimates by blanket size and yarn weight, from baby blankets to king-size bedspreads.
- [Knitting Needle Sizes Explained](https://fibertools.app/guides/needle-sizes-guide): US, UK, and metric needle sizing systems explained, plus how to identify unlabeled needles.
- [UK vs US Crochet Terms](https://fibertools.app/guides/uk-us-crochet-terms-guide): Complete conversion guide between UK and US crochet terminology with full chart.
- [What is WPI and How to Measure It](https://fibertools.app/guides/wpi-guide): How wraps per inch works, how to measure it, and WPI ranges for every yarn weight category.
- [How to Price Handmade Knitting and Crochet](https://fibertools.app/guides/pricing-handmade-guide): Calculate the real cost of handmade items including materials, time, and pricing for commissions.
- [Beginner's Guide to Amigurumi](https://fibertools.app/guides/amigurumi-beginners-guide): Shapes, sizes, and math for crochet amigurumi including magic ring, increases, and connecting parts.

## About
- [About FiberTools](https://fibertools.app/about): Created by a fiber arts expert with 30+ years of experience. Free calculators for knitting, crochet, weaving, spinning, and embroidery.
- [Privacy Policy](https://fibertools.app/privacy): All calculations happen in-browser. No project data is collected or stored.
- [Terms of Use](https://fibertools.app/terms): Terms governing use of FiberTools.
- [Contact](https://fibertools.app/about#contact): hello@fibertools.app

## Key Facts
- 31 free tools across 6 fiber arts disciplines
- All calculations run client-side in the browser
- No login, no signup, no data collection
- Works offline as a Progressive Web App (PWA)
- Mobile-first responsive design
- US crochet terminology standard
- CYC yarn weight classification (Lace 0 through Jumbo 7)
- Last updated: March 2026
